prd.vision: Automatic expense categorization using ML that learns from user corrections

userStories.title: Auto-categorize transactions
acceptanceCriteria: Given a new transaction, When it is imported, Then it is auto-categorized with >85% accuracy
Given a miscategorized transaction, When the user corrects it, Then the model learns from the correction

userStories.title: Custom category management
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user, When they create a custom category, Then it appears in the categorization options
Given a custom category, When transactions match its rules, Then they are auto-assigned

successCriteria: User correction improves accuracy by >5% within 50 corrections
